name: stonksbot

evidenceGates.note: Strategy/backtest surface changed -> attach walk-forward + cost-sensitivity evidence before shipping (fires only after install-hooks.mjs and once the surface exists).

notes: PRE-M0 AUTHORIZED (owner decision 2026-06-29) - no bot code yet, but M0 starts next session and research-backtest is the only active profile. broker-adapter and execution-confirm remain DORMANT: no broker order placement, Telegram execution, live/sandbox trading, or dependencies for those profiles may be introduced until explicitly activated. This readiness branch intentionally does not add the Python toolchain yet; the first M0 code branch must set verify.fast='ruff check . && pytest -q', verify.deep='pytest', verify.ship='pytest --maxfail=1 -q' when pyproject/tests land, and mirror them in AGENTS.md. Harness/gate checks still exist via check-kit, test-gates, secret-scan, and evidence-gate. broadTaskTriggers extend the fan-out nudge with trading-domain terms (RU+EN). forbiddenTerms catch stack-name leakage from sibling agent-kits (web-frontend / desktop-GUI / 3D tooling) - stonksbot is a Python backend trading lab. The git hooks are installed and live: pre-commit and pre-push run on every commit/push (worktrees inherit the main repo .git/hooks). evidenceGates fire only after tools/install-hooks.mjs is installed and the strategy/backtest surface exists.
